underlying_goal: Migrate a legacy PHP 7.0 project to PHP 8.2, fixing all compatibility errors and updating dependencies
friction_detail: Assistant started making changes too quickly before investigating the Caddy routing issue; user had to intervene and request subagents/investigation-first approach
brief_summary: User needed to upgrade a legacy PHP 7.0 project to PHP 8.2, fixing compatibility errors (Illuminate, Symfony, Carbon), replacing aura/auth and Valitron, updating frontend CDN dependencies, and setting up PHPStan; all critical errors resolved and project functional on PHP 8.2
user_instructions_to_assistant: usa subagentes, por favor, esta tarea es muy compleja
antes de ponerte a trabajar, investiga, infórmame y espera a que te confirme que hacer
no cambies nada, solo haz una review, por favor
